summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Invoice Builder React app. All major features working correctly including navigation, CRUD operations, invoice management, PDF generation buttons, and responsive design.

ui_bugs.issue: Invoice number field appears empty on initial load despite auto-generation logic
Sender dropdown options may not be enabled properly on initial load, causing selection timeouts

design_issues.issue: Dark mode toggle not easily discoverable - may be hidden in settings or not prominently displayed

passed_tests: Navigation between all tabs (Invoices, Customers, Senders, New Invoice) works correctly
Invoices table displays with proper data - 4 invoice entries visible
Status filtering dropdown works (All, Draft, Sent, Paid, Overdue, Cancelled)
Search functionality filters invoices correctly ('ACME' search returns 2 results)
Invoice actions work: View, Edit, Delete confirmation dialog
PDF download button is present and accessible
Customer CRUD operations: Add Customer modal opens and saves successfully
Customer table displays correctly with proper data
Sender CRUD operations: Add Sender modal opens with all fields
New Invoice form loads with proper layout
Line items can be added and removed (tested add/remove functionality)
Form validation and field interactions work
Responsive design - mobile view renders correctly
All pages load without JavaScript errors
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix invoice number auto-generation display issue on New Invoice page. The logic exists but the field shows empty on initial load. Also ensure sender dropdown is properly enabled on form load.
